BUU-CANDY_SHELL.title: Candy Shell
BUU-CANDY_SHELL.description: Start each combat with 4 [pink]Ki[/pink]. At the start of your turn, gain 2 [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-MAJIN_CREST.title: Majin Crest
BUU-MAJIN_CREST.description: At the start of your turn, gain 1 [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-ABSORPTION_CELL.title: Absorption Cell
BUU-ABSORPTION_CELL.description: At the start of combat, gain 5 [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-REGENERATION_POD.title: Regeneration Pod
BUU-REGENERATION_POD.description: At the start of your turn, heal 1 HP.
BUU-BUU_ANTENNA_CHARM.title: Buu Antenna Charm
BUU-BUU_ANTENNA_CHARM.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-CAPSULE.title: Capsule
BUU-CAPSULE.description: At the start of your turn, gain 1 [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-PINK_CRYSTAL.title: Pink Crystal
BUU-PINK_CRYSTAL.description: At the start of your turn, gain 1 Block.
BUU-SUPREME_KAI_EARRING.title: Supreme Kai Earring
BUU-SUPREME_KAI_EARRING.description: At the start of combat, gain 6 [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-GUM_PIECE.title: Gum Piece
BUU-GUM_PIECE.description: At the start of your turn, gain 2 Block. Every 3 turns, heal 1 HP.
BUU-CHOCOLATE_BAR.title: Chocolate Bar
BUU-CHOCOLATE_BAR.description: At the start of your turn, heal 1 HP and gain 1 Block.
BUU-KI_AMPOULE.title: Ki Ampoule
BUU-KI_AMPOULE.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 Dexterity. At the start of your turn, gain 1 [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-SPLIT_CELL.title: Split Cell
BUU-SPLIT_CELL.description: At the start of your turn, heal 1 HP. From turn 2 onward, gain 1 Block.
BUU-SPLIT_CELL.flavor: It keeps trying to become two.
BUU-BUU_MEDAL.title: Buu Medal
BUU-BUU_MEDAL.description: At the start of combat, gain 3 [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-CANDY_WRAPPER.title: Candy Wrapper
BUU-CANDY_WRAPPER.description: At the start of combat, enter Regular stance. At the start of your turn, gain 1 Block.
BUU-ANTENNA_RING.title: Antenna Ring
BUU-ANTENNA_RING.description: At the start of combat, enter Regular stance and gain 1 [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-KAI_WATCH.title: Kai Watch
BUU-KAI_WATCH.description: At the start of your turn, enter Super stance and gain 1 [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-REGENERATION_SEED.title: Regeneration Seed
BUU-REGENERATION_SEED.description: At the start of your turn, heal 2 HP.
BUU-ABSORPTION_ORB.title: Absorption Orb
BUU-ABSORPTION_ORB.description: At the start of combat, enter Majin stance and gain 4 [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-MAJIN_BAND.title: Majin Band
BUU-MAJIN_BAND.description: From turn 2 onward, enter Majin stance and gain 1 Strength at the start of your turn.
BUU-PINK_ORB_FRAGMENT.title: Pink Orb Fragment
BUU-PINK_ORB_FRAGMENT.description: At the start of your turn, if you are in Super stance gain 2 [pink]Ki[/pink], otherwise gain 1 Block.
BUU-CANDY_COIN.title: Candy Coin
BUU-CANDY_COIN.description: At the start of your turn, odd turns gain 1 [pink]Ki[/pink], even turns gain 1 Dexterity.
BUU-BUU_BADGE.title: Buu Badge
BUU-BUU_BADGE.description: From turn 2 onward, if you are in Majin stance gain 1 Strength, otherwise gain 1 [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-STRETCH_GEL.title: Stretch Gel
BUU-STRETCH_GEL.description: At the start of your turn, gain 3 Block.
BUU-EVIL_CHIP.title: Evil Chip
BUU-EVIL_CHIP.description: At the start of your turn, if you are in Majin stance gain 1 Strength, otherwise gain 1 [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-GOOD_RIBBON.title: Good Ribbon
BUU-GOOD_RIBBON.description: At the start of your turn, if you are in Regular stance gain 1 Dexterity, otherwise gain 1 Block.
BUU-FUSION_EARRING.title: Fusion Earring
BUU-FUSION_EARRING.description: At the start of your turn, gain 2 [pink]Ki[/pink] and 2 Block (from turn 2 onward).
BUU-RAGE_BEAD.title: Rage Bead
BUU-RAGE_BEAD.description: At the start of your turn, if you are in Majin stance gain 1 Strength, otherwise gain 2 Block.
BUU-CALM_MEDALLION.title: Calm Medallion
BUU-CALM_MEDALLION.description: At the start of your turn, if you are in Regular stance gain 4 Block, otherwise heal 1 HP.
BUU-REFORM_SHARD.title: Reform Shard
BUU-REFORM_SHARD.description: From turn 2 onward, enter Regular stance and heal 2 HP at the start of your turn.
BUU-BUU_ESSENCE.title: Buu Essence
BUU-BUU_ESSENCE.description: At the start of combat, gain 8 [pink]Ki[/pink].
